title: Formatting an Update with automation (Make/Integromat)
excerpt: Hi all, I am wondering if it is possible to include formatted text in the “Create an Update” module from within make. I have text I need to be bolded in the item’s updates menu and I can’t figure out how to do it using a…

posts.author: Tommy004 (Tommy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all, I am wondering if it is possible to include formatted text in the “Create an Update” module from within make. I have text I need to be bolded in the item’s updates menu and I can’t figure out how to do it using automation.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: You can pass in HTML to format it. Just keep it simple.

posts.author: Tommy004 (Tommy)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry about the lack of response here, but this unfortunately is incorrect. Using HTML in Make.com creates the update with the HTML as plain text.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: you may have to instead use the Execute GraphQL Query module and write the query yourself. I suggest using variables since it makes it much easier to get the mappings right.
